message:
feat: add webhook processing operations for GitHub and Linear connectors

Implement inbound webhook handling for GitHub and Linear, enabling
the host to forward pre-verified webhook payloads to connectors for
event normalization and agent notification.

connectors/github/src/connector.rs:
- New github.process_webhook operation: accepts webhook payloads
  forwarded by fcp-host, performs HMAC-SHA256 signature verification,
  parses event type and action from headers/payload, and emits
  normalized FCP events (github.issue.opened, github.pr.merged, etc.)
- Operation metadata includes capability hints and idempotency class

connectors/github/src/types.rs:
- WebhookPayload struct for parsing inbound webhook JSON
- WebhookEventType enum: issues, push, pull_request, release,
  workflow_run, and more
- WebhookAction enum: opened, closed, merged, synchronize, etc.
- Supporting types for webhook header extraction and validation

connectors/linear/src/connector.rs:
- New linear.process_webhook operation with parallel structure to
  GitHub: accepts forwarded payloads, validates signatures, parses
  event data, emits normalized events (linear.issue.create, etc.)
- EventInfo declarations for all emittable Linear event types

connectors/linear/src/types.rs:
- WebhookPayload, WebhookAction (create/update/remove),
  WebhookResourceType, and metadata structures for Linear webhook
  data parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
